title: Better craftable enchanted golden apple
description: A simple mod that adds a straightforward crafting recipe for the enchanted golden apple
body:
## Enchanted Golden Apple Crafting Recipe

This mod introduces a crafting recipe for the Enchanted Golden Apple (sometimes referred to as the Notch Apple) to the game.

**Mod Functionality**

The primary purpose of this mod is to provide a method for players to craft the Enchanted Golden Apple directly, rather than relying solely on finding it in dungeon chests or structures.
**
Crafting Recipe Details**

The recipe utilizes the following ingredients, arranged in the standard pattern on a crafting table:

- 1 Apple
- 8 Gold Blocks
  
The Apple is placed in the center slot, completely surrounded by the eight Gold Blocks.

This recipe provides a resource-intensive, but reliable, means of obtaining the Enchanted Golden Apple in survival mode.
